user.title: OVOS TTS Server
user.description: Connect to an OVOS TTS Server to use as a Home Assistant text-to-speech engine.

data_description.host: Hostname or URL of your OVOS TTS server (e.g. 192.168.1.100 or https://tts.example.com).
data_description.port: Port number. Ignored for HTTPS URLs on port 443.
data_description.voice: Default voice to use. Leave blank for the server default.
data_description.language: Override the default language reported by the server.

reconfigure.title: Reconfigure OVOS TTS Server
reconfigure.description: Update the connection settings for your OVOS TTS Server.

data_description.host: Hostname or URL of your OVOS TTS server (e.g. 192.168.1.100 or https://tts.example.com).
data_description.port: Port number. Ignored for HTTPS URLs on port 443.
data_description.voice: Default voice to use. Leave blank for the server default.
data_description.language: Override the default language reported by the server.

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the OVOS TTS server. Verify the host and port are correct and the server is running.
error.invalid_lang: The specified language is not supported by this server.

abort.already_configured: This OVOS TTS server is already configured.
